education.degree: Bachelor of Science - BS, Data Science | Mathematics Minor | Cognitive Science Minor

experiences.company: Data Science Student Society at UC San Diego
experiences.title: Software Lead
description: Directed a 10-person engineering team to architect and ship a React/TypeScript membership portal serving 1,000+ users, replacing manual tracking.
Accelerated deployment cycles and resolved 10+ weekly hotfixes by engineering GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines and enforcing strict Agile PR reviews.
Secured member data and event analytics by building a robust Supabase/Postgres backend, implementing complex Row Level Security authentication flows.
Increased student confidence in industry software tools by 52% [d=1.26, p<0.01] by designing and delivering technical workshops on React, AWS, Docker, and Git/Github.

experiences.company: Data Science Student Society at UC San Diego
experiences.title: Software Developer
description: Built responsive frontend features for club websites using React.
Led a workshop on developing a personal portfolio site, guiding students through design, layout, and deployment best practices.
Collaborated with a cross-functional team to deliver clean, user-friendly interfaces for student organizations

experiences.title: Data Engineer Intern
description: Saved $100k+ in annual vendor costs by independently architecting and deploying a containerized data ingestion scraper on AWS ECS and Lambda.
Saved 50+ hours monthly by engineering an AI pipeline with AWS Bedrock and Redshift, transforming raw patient data into automated clinical narratives.
Standardized deployments by building multi-environment CI/CD workflows and provisioning infrastructure as code (IaC) using Terraform and AWS Lambda.
Garnered 1,000+ monthly views by developing interactive PowerBI dashboards, directly integrating AWS S3 and Redshift to visualize clinical data.

experiences.title: Data Science Intern
description: Supported evidence-based policymaking by building an NLP data pipeline using Playwright and Hugging Face Transformers for sentiment analysis.
Increased transparency on municipal spending by designing interactive Python (Pandas, Plotly Dash) visualizations for non-technical stakeholders.

experiences.title: Code Coach
description: Led 4 week-long summer camps, teaching Python fundamentals to over 50 students ages 6–17 through hands-on projects and games.
Provided 1-on-1 tutoring in Lua for Roblox game development, helping students apply programming concepts to interactive, real-world applications.
Fostered a fun and supportive learning environment that encouraged curiosity, problem-solving, and creativity in young coders.

experiences.title: Mathematics Tutor
description: Shared my love of math with many kids, inspiring them to see the beauty in it rather than it being a chore.

projects.title: Daedalus
description: Developed G-class rocket with real-time flight software in C++ on Arduino Nano Every, integrating MPU6050, BMP388, and 915Hz LoRa radio on I2C/SPI for telemetry sampling and black-box logging with minimal latency.

Designed a custom PCB in KiCad and 3D-Printed (PETG) nosecone, avionics bay, and fin cans designed in Solidworks and Onshape to sustain high-G loads and protect electronics, targeting a 5,500ft (1 mile+) apogee.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
description: Developed a React portfolio featuring a mesmerizing 3D Boids simulation built with React Three Fiber to implement complex flocking algorithms in a browser environment.
Engineered a modular component library using Tailwind CSS to streamline the deployment of new project showcases and technical articles, ensuring a consistent and responsive UI/UX across all devices.

projects.title: Neural Nector
description: Trained a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) to synthesize realistic flower images, achieving a FID score of 50.
Built an interactive, full-stack web app challenging users to distinguish between real and GAN-generated flower images, garnering 100+ unique users.

projects.title: OnlyDance
description: Won 1st place at DataHacks 2025 against 50+ teams by developing an interactive full-stack app that teaches dance routines using 3D avatars and real-time feedback.
Engineered a real-time similarity scoring algorithm using MediaPipe to extract 3D pose landmarks, implementing sliding window techniques and frame interpolation to quantify dance accuracy.

projects.title: Turbo3D
description: Built a 3D graphics engine from scratch in C++, implementing a custom rasterization pipeline, matrix transformations for camera space, texture mapping, and lighting without external graphics libraries.
Implemented multi-threaded rendering to parallelize vertex processing and rasterization across CPU cores, achieving playable frame rates through iterative performance profiling and optimization.
Debugged rendering artifacts and memory corruption using GDB; isolated race conditions in the multi-threaded pipeline and fixed synchronization issues.
Wrote an OBJ file parser to load 3D models from file, implementing a custom material system, texture mapping, and multiple lighting models for realistic rendering.

projects.title: YipYap: The Chat App for Yappers
description: Built YipYap, a real-time MERN chat app using SocketIO and Zustand, featuring a custom UI designed in Figma and styled with Tailwind CSS to ensure a seamless and responsive user experience.
Integrated Mistral AI via Hugging Face API to generate real-time topic suggestions and personalized groups, automating conversation prompts to boost user engagement and interaction.
Architected the full-stack system with MongoDB and Express, implementing RESTful services and secure user authentication to manage persistent data and private messaging across the application.

projects.title: Sorting Visualizer
description: Developed a sorting algorithm visualizer for 7 different sorting algorithms to help beginners understand the mechanics of each.
Implemented interactive features, allowing users to modify settings such as algorithm parallelization (e.g., Quicksort, Mergesort) and view live metrics such as time taken, swaps, and comparisons.

projects.title: Wave Simulation
description: Implemented 1D and 2D wave simulations using the Finite-Difference Method, applying Vector Calculus concepts for four distinct boundary conditions.
Authored and published research findings in a Medium article, showcasing computational results and visualization.

projects.title: Dino Classifier
description: Associated with UC San Diego
Ranked 3rd of 30 at UCSD DataHacks; built ML models predicting dinosaur traits from modern animal data.
Engineered data pipelines using Pandas and Matplotlib to clean and visualize disparate datasets, identifying physiological correlations between modern species and extinct dinosaur characteristics.
Managed team code via GitHub and delivered a live demo to judges on the model’s practical application.

projects.title: PyTorch Digit Recognizer
description: Built a digit recognizer from scratch using NumPy, linear algebra, and calculus, reaching 87% accuracy before migrating the model to PyTorch for further optimization.
Refined model architecture and tuned hyperparameters to boost MNIST accuracy to 93% while reducing total training time by 10x through efficient tensor operations.
Developed custom visualizations with Matplotlib and Pandas to track performance gains and monitor training convergence across both the raw math and framework implementations.

projects.title: Self Playing Guitar
description: Won 1st place at IEEE’s Fall Competition against 30+ teams by engineering a self-playing guitar with custom laser-cut and 3D printed parts, programming a note transcriber algorithm to map musical inputs to precise servo motions.
